titles.title: A resolution recognizing and honoring National Mushroom Day and the contributions of Chester and Berks Counties to the national mushroom industry and to healthy diets.
A resolution recognizing and honoring National Mushroom Day and the contributions of Chester and Berks Counties to the national mushroom industry and to healthy diets.

action.text: Referred to the Committee on Agriculture, Nutrition, and Forestry.

bill.summary: This resolution supports the recognition of National Mushroom Day and honors Pennsylvania for its contributions to the national mushroom industry.
